mapper.sql: s.session_id, s.workspace_id, s.title, s.status, s.trace_id, s.created_at, s.updated_at, s.opencode_session_id, s.opencode_execution_node_id, s.pinned, s.source_type, s.source_ref_id, s.created_by_user_id, coalesce(v.app_id, pw.app_id) as app_id, a.app_name, coalesce(v.application_workspace_id, pw.application_workspace_id) as application_workspace_id, coalesce(aw.workspace_name, w.name) as workspace_name, v.version_id, v.version

from sessions s left join workspaces w on w.workspace_id = s.workspace_id left join personal_workspaces pw on pw.runtime_workspace_id = s.workspace_id left join application_workspace_versions v_personal on v_personal.version_id = pw.app_workspace_version_id left join application_workspace_versions v_direct on v_direct.runtime_workspace_id = s.workspace_id left join application_workspace_version_replicas vr on vr.runtime_workspace_id = s.workspace_id left join application_workspace_versions v_replica on v_replica.version_id = vr.version_id left join application_workspace_versions v on v.version_id = coalesce(v_direct.version_id, v_replica.version_id, v_personal.version_id) left join application_workspaces aw on aw.workspace_id = coalesce(v.application_workspace_id, pw.application_workspace_id) left join applications a on a.app_id = coalesce(v.app_id, pw.app_id)
